    1. accept(JustificationVisitor)

Interface JustificationElement

All Superinterfaces:
ElementView
All Known Subinterfaces:
CommonElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractSupport, Conclusion, Evidence, Strategy, SubConclusion
public sealed interface JustificationElement extends ElementView permits CommonElement, AbstractSupport
Sealed root of the element hierarchy. Permits only CommonElement and AbstractSupport, ensuring exhaustive pattern matching over all element types.
